notes: Round-4 follow-up to sub 65 (xsubj_subsim, LB -0.63): cross-subject k-NN where each retrieved response is reweighted by COSINE SIMILARITY between learned 768-d subject embeddings (instead of sub 65's Gaussian on subject-mean-accuracy gap). Tests whether the learned subject_embeddings.npy carries richer relevance signal than per-subject mean accuracy alone. GAMMA=5.0 on the embedding cosine.
